name: mrpark-class-api
description: Node API for Mr.Park Class (Google Sheets backend)

scripts.prestart: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=path.join(__dirname,'..');const src=path.join(root,'Student.html');const sprite=path.join(root,'SnailSprite.html');const out=path.join(__dirname,'public','Student.html');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(out),{recursive:true});let html=fs.readFileSync(src,'utf8');if(fs.existsSync(sprite)){html=html.replace(/<\?!= include\('SnailSprite'\); \?>/g,fs.readFileSync(sprite,'utf8'));}fs.writeFileSync(out,html);}"
